title: Compatibly Optimized
description: A blazing-fast modpack designed for maximum compatibility
body:
A collection of carefully selected lightweight, optimized mods designed to make Minecraft run incredibly fast without removing stability.

Includes a tweaked version of Complementary Shaders + Euphoria Patches with close to no visual change while drastically improving performance.

*Settings: 16 Chunks, 12 Simulation Distance, 8GB Ram Allocated*

**Complementary Shaders + Euphoria Patches - Reimagined (Tweaked): ~150 FPS**
![A scene of minecraft with shaders enabled, averaging 150 frames per second](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4dbbf526085ed5c3117142c13d2e5bba40969a7e.png)

**No Shaders: ~900 FPS**
![A scene of minecraft, averaging 900 frames per second](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e3456eac40ada112f6bb7c80a79227ecf5f8414.png)
